calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Los Angeles Unified School District in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Los Angeles Unified School District is Thursday, August 12, 2027. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Los Angeles Unified School District in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Los Angeles Unified School District is Wednesday, June 7, 2028. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Los Angeles Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Los Angeles Unified School District runs Apr 10, 2028–Apr 14, 2028, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2027-2028 for Los Angeles Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Los Angeles Unified School District runs Dec 20, 2027–Jan 7, 2028, 19 days. School resumes Jan 10, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Recess Shifts
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Recess moves to April 10-14 — nearly three weeks later than the March 22-26 window in 2026-2027, returning to an April timing more typical of pre-2026 LAUSD calendars.

yearNumbers.label: Armenian Remembrance Day
yearNumbers.detail: April 24 is Armenian Genocide Remembrance Day, observed as a school holiday — returns after being absent from the 2026-2027 calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Winter Recess
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Recess runs Dec 20–Jan 7, totaling 19 days — the same lengthy break as in 2025-2026 and among the longest of any large California district.

calendarNotes: LAUSD traditional-calendar schools begin the 2027–2028 school year on August 12, 2027. Year-round campuses operate on separate rotating track schedules (Track A, B, and C) with different start, break, and end dates — always confirm which calendar your child's school follows before making plans. Traditional-calendar schools end June 7, 2028.
